description_long: This is a stylized adult figure dressed in a uniform reminiscent of a Western or military theme, featuring a short dress with decorative trim, a large star badge, and a wide-brimmed hat adorned with a flower. The figure has long hair tied in a low ponytail and wears tall boots and gloves. A pair of large, dark, feathered wings extend from the back, giving the character a fantastical appearance. The figure holds a rifle with both hands, positioned diagonally across the body. The stance is confident and alert, with one leg slightly forward and the head tilted downward, partially obscuring the face. The figure stands on an octagonal base, suggesting it is intended as a display or collectible piece.
description: A stylized adult figure in a Western-inspired uniform with a wide-brimmed hat, feathered wings, and a rifle, standing confidently on an octagonal base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's uniform, hat, star badge, rifle, and confident stance with wings visible behind.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, the length of the wings, and the figure's boots and gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full span of the wings, the back of the uniform, and the rifle held behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the side profile of the face, the hat's flower detail, and the wing's curvature.
attribute_clothing_type: Western-style uniform dress with decorative trim, wide-brimmed hat, gloves, and tall boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with one leg forward and arms holding a rifle
